hero.title: Kerotur takes you to the best tours!
hero.subtitle: Kerotur was born from the desire to bring joy, fun, culture, entertainment and adventure to those who want to discover the beauty and charms of our destinations in a light, safe and fun way.

mission.title: Mission
mission.text: Develop, offer and provide the best tourist routes to every client, generating incredible, unforgettable and formidable experiences.

vision.title: Vision
vision.text: Be a globally recognized tourism agency that provides the best tourist routes in all segments it serves.

values.title: Values
values.text: Excellence and more than satisfaction in service, in a cheerful, fun and relaxed way.

about.title: Who we are
about.paragraph1: Kerotur was born from the desire to bring joy, fun, culture, entertainment and adventure to those who want to discover the beauty and charms of our destinations in a light, safe and fun way. We are an agency passionate about creating unique experiences on our tours!
about.paragraph2: Here, each itinerary is unique and carefully planned. Each stop has history, stories and curiosities that generate knowledge. And since knowledge takes up no space, fill your luggage with new memories!
about.paragraph3: Whether for Brazilian or foreign tourists, Kerotur is more than an agency: we are that missing bridge for you to break out of your routine, make new friends and collect incredible, unforgettable and formidable moments.

tours.title: Our Tours
tours.subtitle: Explore the natural beauty and incredible cultures of Rio de Janeiro! Kerotur also offers other destinations in Brazil and around the world.

partners.title: Our Partners
partners.subtitle: We work with the best to guarantee an unforgettable experience.

cancellation.title: Cancellation Policy
cancellation.subtitle: Cancellations:
items: According to EMBRATUR Normative Resolution No. 161, dated 09/08/85, a 10% retention applies for cancellations requested more than 30 days before the start of the excursion.
A 20% retention applies for cancellations requested between 30 and 21 days before the start of the excursion.
A 60% retention applies for cancellations requested between 20 and 7 days before the start of the excursion.
Within 6 days before the start of the excursion, no refund will be issued, regardless of the reason for cancellation or withdrawal.
To provide the services, full free days are required, excluding the arrival and return days.
We are not responsible for loss of services due to reservations made for the same arrival and return dates.
Any changes in the information provided by the passenger must be communicated to the agency at least 24 hours before the services are carried out.
Services, itineraries, dates, and prices are subject to change without prior notice.
In cases of no-show, abandonment, or withdrawal, the client loses the right to any refund or compensation.
